message:
test(abi): expand resolv/dlfcn/ctype/stdio test coverage (+52 tests, +935 lines)

- resolv_abi: 5→43 tests (getaddrinfo, getnameinfo, gai_strerror, gethostbyaddr,
  getservbyname/port, getprotobyname/number, __h_errno_location)
- dlfcn_abi: 3→9 tests (dlopen null/nonexistent, dlsym known/unknown, dlclose, dlerror)
- ctype_abi: 22→29 tests (all _l locale variants, full __is*_l alias sweep)
- stdio_abi: 33→40 tests (feof/ferror/clearerr, rewind/ftell, sscanf, mktemp)
- Total: 1368 frankenlibc-abi tests passing, 0 failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
